architectReview.evidence: agent://39-G007ArchitectAfterBinding: staged generation controls and fields are present, title generation clears stale candidates, demo behavior is explicit, blog/search/compliance/export status non-regression guards are present, and compliance/export draft binding prevents stale or mismatched authorization; blockers empty.

executorQa.evidence: Focused content workflow QA passed: npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts tests/hq-screen-contract.test.ts passed 3 files / 42 tests; npm run typecheck passed; focused Biome check passed. Team lane-a-g007-binding-cleanup-re-ab664b50 completed with zero cleanup/QA blockers. Browser automation was attempted but Chromium could not launch because libnspr4.so is missing; fallback source/API/package evidence is recorded in artifacts/g007-content-workflow-test-report.json.

artifactRefs.description: Focused API/package and UI-source contract verification report for staged content workflow.

contractCoverage.obligation: Content detail exposes package generation, title generation, search structure, compliance, export, and approval workflow controls backed by existing APIs.
Preview displays title candidates, search/thumbnail/first-screen data, comparison table, FAQ, disclosure, price notice, shopping-connect context, and export readiness.
Generation, compliance, and export handoffs avoid later-status regression and bind passing compliance checks to the draft being exported.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts tests/p4-contract.test.ts tests/hq-screen-contract.test.ts; npm run typecheck; focused Biome check

adversarialCases.scenario: Real package load/generation failure or demo-like id other than exact demo.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The UI uses empty load_failed state and does not fall back to demo data; demo bypasses require isDemoMode.

adversarialCases.scenario: Repeated package/title generation for the same content package.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Stale generated title candidates are cleared before inserting replacements, preventing duplicate buildup.

adversarialCases.scenario: Rerun blog/search/compliance/export actions after a package has advanced to later states.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Allowlisted transitions advance only when safe; otherwise status is preserved and progress uses max semantics.

adversarialCases.scenario: Caller supplies a draft id from another package or edits draft after a passing compliance check.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Compliance check only evaluates drafts belonging to the package, and export denies mismatched or stale passing checks.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: Team lane-a-g007-binding-cleanup-re-ab664b50 Lane A inspected all G007 changed content/compliance/export/UI/test files and found zero blocking findings for fallback masking, demo leakage, dead code, duplicate title buildup, unsafe status regression, stale compliance/export authorization, missing staged fields, or missing focused tests. Earlier blockers for title duplication, dead demo helpers, status regression, and compliance/export draft binding were fixed, then cleanup/QA/architect reviews were rerun cleanly. Browser automation was unavailable because the platform Chromium dependency libnspr4.so is missing; the failed attempt is recorded in the artifact and was not used as passing GUI proof.
